user.title: Connect to EcoEdge
user.description: Sign in with your EcoEdge account to enable AI-powered predictive heating control. The receiver endpoint is determined automatically.

error.invalid_config: Invalid configuration; please verify your input and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the EcoEdge service. Check your internet connection.
error.auth_request_failed: Authentication failed. Please try again or contact info@ecoedge.io.

user.title: EcoEdge AI Thermostat settings
user.description: Update your thermostat selection or rotate the access token. Provide your password only if you want to issue a new token.

user.description: Re-authenticate with your EcoEdge account to update credentials.
